creator: igor.arabesc.pavlov@gmail.com
text:
Hi Ralf, 

> After running make distclean, you might want to check if there are still files in this directory: /usr/ports/distfiles/go/net_rclone/pkg/mod/

> If that's the case you should try removing everything from there recursively and retry building rclone.

It has helped to solve the issue. Thank you!
